sentences.target: Je lis un traité de cuisine.

translations.fr: Je lis un traité de cuisine.
translations.it: Sto leggendo un trattato di cucina.
translations.yue: 我喺度睇一本烹飪論著。
translations.vi: Tôi đang đọc một chuyên luận về ẩm thực.
translations.ar: أنا أقرأ أطروحة في فن الطبخ.
translations.hi: मैं पाक-कला पर एक शोधग्रंथ पढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.id: Saya sedang membaca sebuah risalah kuliner.
translations.ja: 私は料理に関する論考を読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determiner of ‘traité’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘lis’.
Preposition introducing a noun complement.
Common noun; complement of ‘de’ indicating the subject matter.

sentences.target: Ce traité explique les bases du droit.
sentences.reading: /sə tʁɛte ɛksplik le baz dy dʁwa/

translations.fr: Ce traité explique les bases du droit.
translations.ipa: /sə tʁɛte ɛksplik le baz dy dʁwa/
translations.en: This treatise explains the basics of law.
translations.es: Este tratado explica las bases del derecho.
translations.de: Diese Abhandlung erklärt die Grundlagen des Rechts.
translations.it: Questo trattato spiega le basi del diritto.
translations.zh-Hans: 这本论著解释了法律的基础。
translations.yue: 呢本論著解釋咗法律嘅基礎。
translations.pt: Este tratado explica as bases do direito.
translations.he: חיבור זה מסביר את יסודות המשפט.
translations.vi: Chuyên luận này giải thích các nền tảng của luật.
translations.nl: Dit traktaat legt de basis van het recht uit.
translations.hu: Ez az értekezés elmagyarázza a jog alapjait.
translations.hi: यह शोधग्रंथ कानून की बुनियादी बातें समझाता है.
translations.el: Αυτή η πραγματεία εξηγεί τα βασικά του δικαίου.
translations.nb: Denne avhandlingen forklarer grunnlaget for jus.
translations.sv: Denna avhandling förklarar grunderna i juridik.
translations.da: Denne afhandling forklarer grundlaget for jura.
translations.ja: この論考は法の基本を説明しています。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifies ‘traité’.
Common noun, masculine singular; grammatical subject.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Definite article, plural; determiner of ‘bases’.
Common noun, plural; direct object of ‘explique’.
Contracted preposition (‘de + le’) introducing the complement ‘droit’.
Common noun; complement of ‘du’ specifying the field.

sentences.target: On discute du traité au café.

translations.fr: On discute du traité au café.
translations.en: We talk about the treaty at the café.
translations.es: Hablamos del tratado en el café.
translations.de: Wir reden im Café über den Vertrag.
translations.ko: 우리는 카페에서 그 조약에 대해 이야기해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在咖啡馆讨论那份条约。
translations.yue: 我哋喺咖啡店討論嗰份條約。
translations.pt: Falamos sobre o tratado no café.
translations.he: אנחנו מדברים על האמנה בבית הקפה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi bàn về hiệp ước ở quán cà phê.
translations.ar: نحن نتحدث عن المعاهدة في المقهى.
translations.nl: We praten in het café over het verdrag.
translations.hi: हम कैफ़े में संधि पर बात करते हैं.
translations.el: Συζητάμε για τη συνθήκη στην καφετέρια.
translations.nb: Vi snakker om traktaten på kaféen.
translations.id: Kami membicarakan perjanjian itu di kafe.
translations.sv: Vi pratar om fördraget på kaféet.
translations.cs: V kavárně se bavíme o smlouvě.
translations.da: Vi taler om traktaten på caféen.
translations.ja: 私たちはカフェで条約について話しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun (often colloquial ‘we’).
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreeing with ‘on’).
Contracted preposition (‘de + le’) introducing the object ‘traité’.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of ‘du’ (topic discussed).
Contracted preposition (‘à + le’) introducing a locative complement.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘au’, indicating location.

sentences.target: Tu dois signer le traité aujourd’hui.

translations.fr: Tu dois signer le traité aujourd’hui.
translations.en: You have to sign the treaty today.
translations.es: Tienes que firmar el tratado hoy.
translations.de: Du musst den Vertrag heute unterschreiben.
translations.ko: 너는 오늘 그 조약에 서명해야 해.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今天得签署这份条约。
translations.pt: Você tem que assinar o tratado hoje.
translations.he: אתה צריך לחתום על האמנה היום.
translations.vi: Bạn phải ký hiệp ước hôm nay.
translations.nl: Je moet het verdrag vandaag ondertekenen.
translations.hu: Ma alá kell írnod a szerződést.
translations.hi: तुम्हें आज संधि पर हस्ताक्षर करने हैं.
translations.el: Πρέπει να υπογράψεις τη συνθήκη σήμερα.
translations.nb: Du må signere traktaten i dag.
translations.id: Kamu harus menandatangani perjanjian itu hari ini.
translations.sv: Du måste skriva under fördraget i dag.
translations.da: Du skal underskrive traktaten i dag.
translations.ja: あなたは今日その条約に署名しなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Modal auxiliary in present indicative, 2nd person singular, expressing obligation.
Infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal ‘dois’.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘traité’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘signer’.
Temporal adverb indicating when the action takes place.
